'llR!mll/130l3/692tm31'!!!2-13~-~ ( fu;u ftm fir:;!) ] ~~.~~ 975 Gl/2013 MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND IDGHWAYS NOTIFICMION New Delhi the 8th Man;h, 2013 S.O. 58l(E).-In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 7 of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956) read with Rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determiriation ofRates and Collection) Rules, 2008, the Central Government hereby rescinds the notification · number S.O. 1088(E), dated 5th May, 2008, published iri the Gazette of India, Extraordiriary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) of Government of India iri the erstwhile Ministry of Shipping, Road Transport and Highways (Department of Road Transport and Highways) as a Concession Agreement has been entered between National Highway Authority oflndia and M/s. Pune Sholaplir Road Development Company Limited, Mumbai (hereinafter· referred to as the "Concessionaire") on 30-9-2009 for the Four lanirig ofPune-Solapur Section ofNational Highway · No. 9 from km. 144.4QO to km. 249.000 iri the State of Maharashtra under NHDP Phase-III on Design, Build, Firiance, Operate and Transfer (DBFOT). Toll Basis and the Concessionaire will collect the user fee as per the contractual provisions. Besides, the operation of the standalone bridge will not be viable on account of reduction of user fee to 40% of the existirig rates. [No. NHAI/13013/692/C0/12-13/GC-Sholapur · (Siria River Bridge)] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road.
